name: I didn't go to doctor right after neck tweak at work, symptoms worse now, can I still claim?
description: Yes, report now if within time limits.

mainEntity.name: I didn't go to doctor right after neck tweak at work, symptoms worse now, can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, report now if within time limits.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if you report soon and doctor links delayed symptoms to work injury.** Utah allows claims for evolving injuries if notice within limits.[1] Key factors: Explain delay reasonably; medical causation key; no gap too long without cause. See doctor now, document timeline. Insurers challenge delays, so attorney helps prove connection.
